name: [GenAI][Order Support Assistant] Sensitive data egress detected
message: Zero-tolerance control breached: confirmed PII/secret/protected-data egress event. Escalate to Security + Data Governance immediately per severity policy. @security-oncall @pagerduty-genai-oncall
source_addendum_ref: AI Observability - Datadog Implementation Addendum, §8 — 'Zero tolerance for confirmed credential, secret or protected data leakage'
